title: People visible on GANTT Chart
excerpt:
Description
Currently, the ‘People’ column is not directly supported in the Gantt chart view on monday.com. This means that while you can add the ‘People’ column to your board, it won’t be visible in the Gantt chart view…

posts.author: jade.woodward (Jade)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the ‘People’ column is not directly supported in the Gantt chart view on monday.com. This means that while you can add the ‘People’ column to your board, it won’t be visible in the Gantt chart view itself.

We need to be able to see the ‘people’ column, so we know who is responsible for each task when in GANTT view. Currently we have to do this in Excel which defeats the object of using Monday.com for our project timelines.

What are you trying to achieve

view people in the GANTT chart view
